description: ExactSHAP test cases with mathematically verified Shapley values

test_suites.name: linear_model_zero_background

cases.name: all_ones
cases.comment: SHAP[i] = weight[i] * instance[i] for linear model with zero background

test_suites.name: weighted_model_with_bias

cases.name: at_mean
cases.comment: At background mean, SHAP values are zero

test_suites.name: quadratic_model
test_suites.description: Quadratic model: y = x0 * x1. With zero background, features share contribution equally due to symmetry.

cases.name: symmetric_3_4
cases.comment: For y=x0*x1 with zero background: SHAP[0]=SHAP[1]=(prediction-base)/2=6

cases.name: symmetric_2_2
cases.comment: Symmetric case: each feature contributes half

test_suites.name: four_feature_linear

test_suites.name: quadratic_nonzero_background

cases.name: at_background

cases.name: instance_3_4
cases.comment: Asymmetric Shapley: x0 gets (4+8)/2=6, x1 gets (6+2)/2=4
